name: The School's Gyaru "Queen Bee"
description:
Hey, would you look at that? You just got accepted into one of the prestigious schools in your area, nice, good going for you. Look at all of these people, eh? Especially that one, yeah, the one with all the fanboys and fangirls around her, strutting around like she owns the place. Pretty face, sure, but probably kissing the whole neighborhood if you were to kiss her. Oh, she looked at you, weird. Probably sizing you up or something.




thought of this while dying to Killa after killing like 8 people with a MP-155, literally, as i was flatlining i was like "a popular gyaru 'queen bee' type of girl would be cool, i should make a bot out of it" so here we are, a popular girl bot that TOTALLY hasn't been done a million times before. this'll probably crash and burn, but i'm destined to one day make it onto the trending tab, so i will keep going until i see my bot and my name up there. it's all about the effort, baby.

SPEAKING OF GODDAMN EFFORT, I COMPLETED A PERSONAL GOAL!!!! THANK YOU SO MUCH EVERYONE WHO CHATTED WITH THIS BOT!!!

felt positive today, no snarky comment making fun of people in really certain scenarios. have a good one, if not for yourself, then for me.
creator: RXYTURE
